name: Clearfield, Inc.
summary: Clearfield, Inc. (CLFD) is a manufacturer and distributor of fiber optic equipment and related products for the telecommunications industry. The company designs and produces fiber management, fiber protection, and fiber delivery platforms used by broadband service providers to deploy fiber-to-the-home and other fiber optic network infrastructure solutions.
